metadata.description: Study tools for senior students. Install: /plugin marketplace add <github-user>/studykit then /plugin install studykit@studykit. After installing, run /setup from a new folder you want to use for schoolwork.

plugins.name: studykit
plugins.description: Onboards your subjects and generates a project CLAUDE.md, scaffolds assignments (thesis -> structure -> evidence -> technique -> A-grade angles), and learns to write in your own voice. You write the prose; it does the analytical heavy lifting.
